title: A protocol and software implementation for analyzing emergence dynamics of diabetes with obesity using numerical continuation and bifurcation analysis
author: Vehpi Yildirim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Type 2 diabetes (T2D) is a multifactorial disease that slowly and inconspicuously progresses over years. Here we explain a protocol and software implementation for analyzing slow progression dynamics of T2D with obesity. The protocol exploits the differences between the timescales of the metabolic variables and uses numerical continuation and bifurcation analysis. We explain how the protocol and related software can be employed to analyze the bi-stable system dynamics and identify the thresholds that separate healthy and diabetic states.
